package rulecoverage

func PositiveOptionalTxNilParameterOnRepositoryApi() string {
    ruleID := "optional_tx_nil_parameter_on_repository_api"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repository APIs that use optional `tx *gorm.DB` parameters instead of explicit unit-of-work contracts."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
